summary: V10.3 end-to-end testing of Gas Naturale redesign + new transfer/audit-log endpoints + email dispatch + landing-from-sidebar nav. Backend: 10/11 pytest PASS (1 critical FAIL on PATCH status). Frontend: 14/14 testids present, redesign palette violet/indigo/blue confirmed (color audit on Studio Gaze: 0 border-green, 0 border-amber, 0 border-black, 0 bg-green-500/600/700; only 1 bg-amber remnant in a small ready/not-ready ribbon — minor). Sidebar logo → '/' and header-home-button → '/' both work and show Landing for logged-in user. Transfer dialog opens, submits successfully (POST /api/gas-project/{pid}/transfer → 200 with ok:true, shared_access:{email,role,shared_at,shared_by,note}, target_exists_in_platform:false, email_sent:false). Audit log GET endpoint returns {audit_log:[...], shared_access:[...]} and contains the test transfer entry persisted. Dossier ZIP regression: 200 with >30 files. Stepper 10/10 at 100% preserved. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: PATCH /api/gas-project/{pid} rejects status='awaiting_avizare' and status='avizat' with 400 'Status invalid' — backend whitelist only accepts {draft,in_review,approved,signed,archived}. Frontend sendToAvizare and UploadAvizatButton both broken end-to-end.

critical.issue: Frontend sends status='awaiting_avizare' (send-to-avizare button) and status='avizat' (upload-avizat) but backend validator at gas_project_routes.py line 385 only accepts {draft,in_review,approved,signed,archived}. Both flows return 400 'Status invalid'. send-to-avizare confirmed via UI (PATCH response captured = 400). Same will happen for upload-avizat post-upload status update.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with ok:false and 'SMTP not configured' style error (acceptable per spec). NOT 500 — good. Just flagging that Gmail App Password still missing in backend/.env so no real emails leave the platform; UI will show success/warning toast but no email dispatched.

integration_issues.issue: PATCH 400 'Status invalid' returned by backend. UI shows error toast. Same root cause: status whitelist mismatch.
After file upload the second PATCH call sends status='avizat' which is rejected by backend (400). Upload itself may succeed at /api/upload but project status will not move to 'avizat'.

issues: Minor remnants of old palette in GasChronologicalStepper.jsx — lines 385, 493, 510 still use bg-green-100/600 and bg-amber-100/500 for 'overall_ready' and section-ready ribbons. Color audit caught 1 visible bg-amber-* element. Cosmetic — does not affect the main violet/indigo/blue feel of the page.

tests_executed.detail: POST /transfer with TEST_colaborator@example.com role=vgd → 200 ok:true, shared_access.email/role correct, target_exists_in_platform=false, email_sent=false (SMTP unconfigured — expected)
GET /audit-log returns {audit_log:[...], shared_access:[...]} with our transfer entry persisted, by=owner email
POST /phase/primarie/dispatch → 200 (with email_ok=false). Did NOT 500 — meets spec.
PATCH {status:'awaiting_avizare'} → 400 'Status invalid'. CRITICAL — frontend send-to-avizare broken.
PATCH {status:'avizat'} → 400 'Status invalid'. Upload-avizat post-upload status mutation broken.
sidebar-brand-link href='/' click navigates to / and Landing visible (logged-in user)
border-green=0, border-amber=0, border-black=0, bg-green-500/600/700=0; bg-amber-500/600=1 (minor remnant in GasChronologicalStepper)

14/14 expected testids present: consumer-mentinuti-add, consumer-total-qmin, add-aviz-custom, generate-deviz, email-dispatch-panel, dispatch-primarie, send-to-avizare, upload-avizat, download-dossier-complet, preview-dossier, open-transfer-dialog, consumer-col-mentinuti, consumer-col-dezafectati, consumer-col-noi
open-transfer-dialog → modal visible → fill email+role(vgd)+note → submit → POST /transfer captured: 200 → dialog closes
Click send-to-avizare → PATCH /gas-project/{pid} → 400 'Status invalid'. Backend bug surfaced in UI.

action_items: CRITICAL: /app/backend/gas_project_routes.py line 385 — extend allowed status set to include 'awaiting_avizare' and 'avizat' (and any other workflow states used by the frontend). Current: {draft,in_review,approved,signed,archived}. Required: add 'awaiting_avizare', 'avizat'. Otherwise both send-to-avizare AND upload-avizat flows fail end-to-end despite the redesign cabling.

(cosmetic) GasChronologicalStepper.jsx lines 385/493/510 — replace remaining bg-green-100/600 and bg-amber-100/500 with violet/indigo/blue (or use bg-emerald shade ONLY for success-state if user accepts emerald). User explicitly said no green/amber.

(carry-over) Configure Gmail App Password in /app/backend/.env so phase dispatch + transfer emails actually leave the platform (currently email_sent:false is acceptable per spec but undesired for production).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend status whitelist (line 385) is hard-coded and out of sync with the workflow states the frontend uses. Consider centralizing allowed_statuses in catalog.py keyed by domain (gaze-naturale) so backend and frontend stay aligned.

Transfer endpoint correctly persists shared_access AND audit_log atomically in a single $push. Good. Best-effort email failure does not break the API contract — returns ok:true with email_sent:false. Solid design.
TransferPayload accepts arbitrary target_role string — no enum validation. Consider Literal['proiectant','vgd','operator','executant','avize','contabilitate','ofertare','rte'] to prevent typos.
GasNaturalProjectV2.jsx grew to ~1800 lines; consider splitting TransferProjectDialog, UploadAvizatButton, ConsumersBlock into separate files for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (20/21) — only send-to-avizare/upload-avizat broken due to backend bug

seed_data_creation: Test transfer entry created on demo project gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4: target=test_colaborator@example.com, role=vgd, note='Te rog verifica (test automated)'. Stored in db.gas_projects.audit_log + shared_access. NOT cleaned up — will accumulate on repeated runs but does not affect functionality (multiple entries allowed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend redesign+wiring is solid (sidebar logo→/, header→/, transfer dialog full E2E, all testids, palette correct except 1 small bg-amber ribbon). The ONLY broken flow is status mutation — both send-to-avizare (status='awaiting_avizare') and upload-avizat (status='avizat') fail because backend whitelist at gas_project_routes.py:385 doesn't include those states. After fix, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_v100_transfer_audit.py and re-verify UI by clicking send-to-avizare on /gaze-naturale/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 — should return 200. Email dispatch + transfer email both run with email_sent=false because no Gmail App Password configured — backend correctly degrades to 200/ok:false (NOT 500).
rca of the issue: PATCH /api/gas-project/{pid} status whitelist drift. Backend route in gas_project_routes.py was authored before the new workflow states ('awaiting_avizare', 'avizat') were added in the frontend redesign. Validator accepts only the legacy 5 states {draft,in_review,approved,signed,archived}. Fix: add the two missing states to the set on line 385. Reproduction: `curl -X PATCH $URL/api/gas-project/gp_e79e2810cc64b5b4 -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN' -d '{"status":"awaiting_avizare"}'` → 400 'Status invalid'. Mitigation: extend whitelist (1-line change).
